title: Google OAuth access denied for unapproved app
symptom: When attempting to authenticate with Google Drive, n8n returns 'Error 403: access_denied'. This indicates that the app is still in testing and not fully verified.
applies_when: Using Google OAuth for Google Drive integration
not_this_if: App has been fully verified by Google
root_cause: The error occurs because the Google app is in a testing phase and can only be accessed by users who have been explicitly approved by the developer. If your email is not on the approved list, access will be denied.
fix_steps: Contact the developer to add your email to the list of approved test users.
Ensure you are using the same email for authentication that is approved.
agent_instruction: Request to be added as a test user for the Google Drive integration.
